text:
A1400F_TITLE_PGMS_PYR_SW A1400F - Payer: Title programs CHAR 1 This column documents whether the resident's payer is Title programs. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
632 A1400G_OTHR_GOVT_PYR_SW A1400G_OTHR_GOVT_PYR_SW A1400G - Payer: Other Government CHAR 1 This column documents whether the resident's payer is other Government. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
633 A1400H_PRVT_INSRNC_PYR_SW A1400H_PRVT_INSRNC_PYR_SW A1400H - Payer: Private insurance/Medigap CHAR 1 This column documents whether the resident's payer is private
